name: mcp-server-stripe
description: Integrates Stripe APIs with agent frameworks for payments and custom actions.

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with clear tool names and adequate descriptions. Most tools provide sufficient context about their functionality and when to use them. Parameter descriptions are generally clear with appropriate constraints specified. However, some descriptions are overly verbose with formatting issues, and a few tools have minor gaps in explaining important nuances like the relationship between amount_off and currency parameters.
